discover.label: Your adventure starts here
discover.title: Discover Marrakech
discover.subtitle: Explore the ochre city and its surroundings with our comprehensive guides and carefully curated road trip itineraries.
discover.guide_desc: Dive into the essence of the ochre city: historic monuments, enchanting flavors and unforgettable experiences await you.
discover.guide_h3: Activities: quad, hammam, hot air balloon
discover.itin_desc: Get behind the wheel and discover Morocco's most spectacular landscapes, just a few hours from Marrakech.

reservation.no_vehicles_desc: Try changing your dates or filters.

agency.title: Our Agency
agency.subtitle: Automotive excellence at your service from Marrakech. Personalized support for every journey.
agency.about_text_1: Bouderba Rental Cars is a vehicle rental agency based in Marrakech, in the heart of Morocco. Founded on values of trust, quality, and proximity, we provide you with a fleet of carefully maintained vehicles to meet all your travel needs.
agency.about_text_2: Whether for a business trip, family vacation, or a simple getaway, our team supports you with personalized and professional service. We believe that every customer deserves a smooth, transparent rental experience with no surprises.
agency.val_quality_desc: Recent and perfectly maintained vehicles for your comfort and safety.
agency.val_trust_desc: Total transparency on rates, no hidden fees, a clear contract.
agency.val_avail_desc: A responsive team, available 24/7 to assist you at any time.
agency.val_flex_desc: Delivery and pickup of the vehicle wherever you want in Marrakech.
agency.step_1_desc: Browse our catalog and select the vehicle that fits your needs and budget.
agency.step_2_desc: Fill out the booking form with your dates, locations, and details. It's fast and easy.
agency.step_3_desc: We deliver the vehicle to the agreed location or you come pick it up. Enjoy your ride!
agency.cta_desc: Book now and enjoy a premium rental service.

legal.title: Legal Information
legal.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our conditions, privacy, and legal notices.
legal.cond_subtitle: Between the customer designated overleaf and the company BOUDERBA RENTAL CARS
legal.cond_1_desc: The rental is personal and under no circumstances transferable. The renter undertakes not to allow the vehicle to be driven by anyone other than those approved by BOUDERBA. Approved drivers act as agents of the renter, who becomes fully responsible for the vehicle as soon as it has been collected.
legal.cond_1_desc2: The renter is prohibited from participating in any rally, race or any other competition of any kind, as well as trials or preparations. The renter is also prohibited from driving off paved roads and using unpaved tracks. All damages caused as a result of such use will be invoiced to the customer who undertakes to pay them.
legal.cond_1_desc3: The renter undertakes not to use the vehicle for illegal purposes, for the paid transport of passengers, and not to take it outside Moroccan territory. The renter also undertakes not to attach a trailer to the vehicle, not to make any modifications to the vehicle, never to leave the registration documents inside it, and to use the locking and protection systems at every stop.
legal.cond_2_desc1: Rental prices and the deposit are determined by the rates in effect and are payable in advance. The deposit is mandatory and cannot be used for an extension without the prior agreement of the lessor.
legal.cond_2_desc2: To avoid any dispute in case the renter wishes to keep the vehicle for a period longer than that indicated on the contract, the renter must, after obtaining the lessor's agreement, send the additional rental amount forty-eight hours before the expiration of the current rental period, failing which they may face legal proceedings for misappropriation and breach of trust.
legal.cond_2_desc3: A rental day runs from midnight to midnight, and any day started is due in full.
legal.cond_3_desc: The renter acknowledges having received the vehicle designated in the contract in perfect working and clean condition. The renter undertakes never to tamper with the odometer, failing which they will pay at least the amount corresponding to 500 kilometers per rental day. If the odometer has not functioned, the number of kilometers to be paid will be calculated by determining the distance traveled on a map. The vehicle must be returned in the same condition as at departure.
legal.cond_3_desc2: The vehicle is equipped with five tires in good condition and without cuts. In case of deterioration or cutting of a tire for a cause other than normal wear (brutal driving, excessive speed, or other), the renter undertakes to replace it immediately with a tire of the same brand and dimensions.
legal.cond_3_desc3: Normal mechanical wear is the responsibility of the lessor. All repairs resulting from abnormal wear, negligence, or accidental causes shall be borne by the renter and carried out without delay by the lessor. Their amount will be increased by immobilization compensation.
legal.cond_3_desc4: In the event that the vehicle is immobilized due to a breakdown or accidental cause, repairs may be carried out (after agreement of the lessor) and must be the subject of a detailed and receipted invoice. Replaced defective parts must be presented with the receipted invoice.
legal.cond_3_desc5: Under no circumstances may the renter claim any compensation whatsoever, whether as a result of a delay in the delivery of the vehicle or cancellation of the rental, or as a result of repairs necessitated by normal wear and carried out during the rental. The renter undertakes to return the vehicle with all its accessories, tools, and equipment on the date and at the place specified in the contract.
legal.cond_4_desc: Fuel is the responsibility of the renter. The renter must continuously check the oil and water levels and carry out lubrication at the intervals indicated by the manufacturer (gearbox and differential oil as well as engine oil change). These works must be justified by invoices stating the number of kilometers recorded at the time of the operation.
legal.cond_4_desc2: If the vehicle is delivered new, the renter undertakes to have the mandatory services carried out by an official agent of the vehicle brand. These expenses will be reimbursed upon presentation of receipts.
legal.cond_5_desc: Subject to the execution of this contract, the renter is covered without limitation against the financial consequences of their liability, as well as their spouse and direct ascendants, employees in the exercise of their duties. Furthermore, the coverage does not apply when the vehicle carries more passengers than the number of seats indicated on the insurance certificate.
legal.cond_5_desc2: Against theft and fire of the vehicle, subject to the deductible provided in the tariff, excluding clothing and all transported objects. Coverage does not apply in case of theft of the vehicle by an employee of the renter or by one of their representatives.
legal.cond_5_desc3: Personal insurance: the renter may take out passenger insurance for themselves and passengers of the vehicle for an additional insurance premium (see current rates in brochures).
legal.cond_5_desc4: The renter automatically subrogate the lessor in their rights for the exercise of recourse against third parties for material damages. Any compensation obtained first serves to reimburse the lessor for costs remaining at their charge, with the balance going to the renter. Fees and expenses incurred for the recovery of this compensation are borne by the renter and the lessor in proportion to the amounts due to them.
legal.cond_5_desc5: Excluded from coverage is any accident occurring to objects or merchandise. The above insurance is only valid for the stipulated rental period. If the renter keeps the vehicle beyond without having regularized their situation under the conditions provided in Article 2, they lose the benefit of all guarantees provided in the contract.
legal.cond_5_desc6: There is no insurance for any driver under the age of 21 who does not hold a valid driving license for at least one year. Any driver found to be intoxicated or under the influence of alcohol as recorded in the police or gendarmerie report is stripped of theft, fire, and vehicle damage guarantees.
legal.cond_5_desc7: The renter undertakes to report to the lessor within 48 hours and immediately to the police authorities, any accident, theft or fire, even partial, failing which they will lose the benefit of insurance. The declaration must include the circumstances, date, time, place, amount of damages, a police or bailiff report outside major cities, names and addresses of witnesses, and information about the other party.
legal.cond_5_desc8: The renter must under no circumstances discuss liability, nor deal or settle with third parties regarding the accident. The renter undertakes to communicate to the lessor any document received as a result of an accident and all useful information.
legal.cond_6_desc: At the end of the rental and upon return of the vehicle, the renter must hand over the registration certificate and all papers necessary for its circulation, failing which, as these documents are essential for new rentals, the rental will continue to be charged at the original price until they are returned to the lessor. In case of loss of these documents, the renter must pay the cost of duplicates.
legal.cond_7_desc: The renter remains solely responsible for fines, traffic violations, official reports, and customs proceedings established against them. Consequently, they undertake to reimburse the lessor for all costs of this nature that may have been paid on their behalf.
legal.cond_8_desc: The renter is strictly prohibited from abandoning the vehicle. In case of impossibility, they must notify the lessor who will repatriate it at the renter's expense.
legal.cond_9_desc: In case of dispute relating to the execution of this contract, jurisdiction is attributed to the court of Marrakech. Stamp and registration fees remain the responsibility of the renter.
legal.priv_1_desc: As part of our services, we collect the following information:
legal.priv_1_li1: Identification info: first name, last name, ID or passport number.
legal.priv_1_li2: Contact info: email address, phone number.
legal.priv_1_li3: Booking info: dates, pickup and return locations, chosen vehicle.
legal.priv_2_desc: The collected data is used exclusively to:
legal.priv_2_li1: Process and confirm your booking requests.
legal.priv_2_li4: Comply with our legal and contractual obligations.
legal.priv_2_desc2: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties for commercial purposes.
legal.priv_3_desc: Your data is kept for a period of 5 years from the end of your rental agreement, in compliance with our legal obligations.
legal.priv_4_desc: In accordance with Law No. 09-08 on the protection of individuals with regard to the processing of personal data, you have the following rights:
legal.priv_4_li1: Right of access: obtain a copy of your data.
legal.priv_4_li2: Right of rectification: correct inaccurate data.
legal.priv_4_li3: Right to erasure: request the deletion of your data.
legal.priv_4_li4: Right to object: object to the processing of your data.
legal.priv_4_desc2: To exercise these rights, contact us at the address indicated in the Legal Notices section.
legal.priv_5_desc: Our site uses technical cookies necessary for its proper functioning. No tracking or advertising cookies are used without your explicit consent.
legal.ment_2_desc: This site is hosted by a third-party provider. For any information related to hosting, please contact us directly.
legal.ment_3_desc: All content on this site (text, images, logos, graphics) is the exclusive property of Bouderba Rental Cars. Any reproduction, even partial, is prohibited without prior written permission.
legal.ment_4_desc: Bouderba Rental Cars strives to keep the information on this site up-to-date and accurate. However, we cannot be held responsible for errors or omissions, nor the consequences of their use.
legal.ment_5_desc: This site and these legal notices are subject to Moroccan law. In case of dispute, jurisdiction is attributed to the court of Marrakech.

locations_page.title: Our Locations
locations_page.subtitle: Find us easily in and around Marrakech. We offer various pickup points to make your life easier.

guide.meta_title: What to Do in Marrakech — Complete Guide
guide.meta_desc: Discover the best activities, monuments and experiences in Marrakech. A complete tourist guide to plan your stay in the ochre city.
guide.hero_subtitle: A complete guide to the must-sees, flavors and adventures awaiting you in the pearl of Southern Morocco.
guide.place_1_desc: The beating heart of Marrakech. Storytellers, musicians, fresh orange juice stands by day; open-air restaurants and street shows by night. A sensory experience unlike anywhere else.
guide.place_1_tip: Head to a rooftop café for a panoramic view at sunset.
guide.place_2_desc: Created by painter Jacques Majorelle and restored by Yves Saint Laurent, this enchanting botanical garden houses giant cacti, bamboo and the famous Majorelle blue.
guide.place_2_tip: Arrive at opening (8am) to avoid the crowds.
guide.place_3_desc: A masterpiece of 19th-century Moroccan architecture. Zellige, carved plaster, painted cedar wood: every room is a marvel. The inner gardens are absolutely serene.
guide.place_3_tip: Entry is 70 MAD. Allow 1.5 hours for the visit.
guide.place_4_desc: The 77-meter minaret is the symbol of Marrakech, visible from every point in the city. The surrounding gardens are perfect for a peaceful stroll.
guide.place_4_tip: The interior is not open to non-Muslims, but the exterior and gardens are worth a visit.
guide.place_5_desc: A labyrinth of covered alleys housing thousands of artisans: leather workers, weavers, goldsmiths, coppersmiths. Haggling is the name of the game!
guide.place_5_tip: Offer 40% of the asking price and negotiate from there.
guide.place_6_desc: Over 100,000 palm trees across 13,000 hectares at the city gates. Perfect for a quad ride, camel trek or a break at a luxury resort.
guide.place_6_tip: Perfect for a half-day escape from the city center.
guide.gastro_intro: Moroccan cuisine is a journey in itself. Here are the specialties you must try:
guide.gastro_1_desc: Lamb with prunes, chicken with preserved lemons, kefta with eggs… every riad has its secret recipe.
guide.gastro_2_desc: Traditionally served on Fridays, this family dish is shared together, topped with vegetables and tender meat.
guide.gastro_3_desc: Crispy phyllo pastry filled with pigeon or chicken, almonds and cinnamon. An unforgettable sweet-savory combination.
guide.gastro_4_desc: The ultimate hospitality ritual. Served piping hot, sweet and frothy. Refusing a cup would be impolite!
guide.act_1_desc: Fly over the Palmeraie and Atlas Mountains at sunrise. A breathtaking, magical moment.
guide.act_2_desc: Explore the Palmeraie or Agafay desert trails on an all-terrain quad bike.
guide.act_3_desc: Be pampered with a black soap scrub and argan oil massage. Absolute relaxation.
guide.act_4_desc: Learn to prepare a tagine or couscous with a local chef. Take the recipes home!
guide.act_5_desc: 45 minutes from Marrakech, the Agafay desert offers a spectacular lunar landscape. Optional dinner under the stars.
guide.act_6_desc: Berber carpets, leather slippers, hand-painted pottery, spices… bring a piece of Morocco home.
guide.cta_desc: Rent a car and discover the ochre city in complete freedom. Delivery to the airport or your riad.

itineraires.meta_desc: The best road trips from Marrakech: Essaouira, Ouarzazate, Ouzoud Waterfalls. Detailed itineraries with durations, distances and points of interest.
itineraires.hero_subtitle: Hit the road and discover Morocco's treasures. Three legendary routes departing from Marrakech, accessible by rental car.
itineraires.route_1_desc: Head to the Atlantic coast! Essaouira welcomes you with its blue and white ramparts, lively fishing port and wild windswept beaches. A striking contrast to Marrakech.
itineraires.route_1_poi_1_desc: Stop at a Berber women's cooperative. Free tasting and discovery of the production process.
itineraires.route_1_poi_2_desc: UNESCO World Heritage. Peaceful alleys, art galleries, thuya wood artisans. Less chaotic than Marrakech.
itineraires.route_1_poi_3_desc: Grilled sardines at the port for 30-40 MAD. The freshest fish in Morocco.
itineraires.route_1_poi_4_desc: Kitesurfing, windsurfing, horseback riding at sunset. Essaouira is the wind capital.
itineraires.route_1_tip: The road is straight and well-maintained. Leave early in the morning to enjoy the whole day.
itineraires.route_2_desc: Morocco's most spectacular road. Cross the Tichka pass at 2,260m altitude, discover the lunar landscapes of the Anti-Atlas and visit the kasbah used as a set for Game of Thrones and Gladiator.
itineraires.route_2_poi_1_desc: The highest point of the road (2,260m). Mandatory photo stop with panoramic mountain views.
itineraires.route_2_poi_2_desc: UNESCO-listed ksar. Fortified earthen village, set of many Hollywood films.
itineraires.route_2_poi_3_desc: Visit the sets of Gladiator, Kingdom of Heaven and Game of Thrones. Ouarzazate is 'Morocco's Hollywood'.
itineraires.route_2_poi_4_desc: If visiting in May, the Dades Valley is in bloom. Rose Festival in Kelaat M'Gouna.
itineraires.route_2_tip: Winding road with many switchbacks. Drive carefully and enjoy the panoramic rest stops.
itineraires.route_3_desc: Morocco's most beautiful waterfalls with a 110-meter drop in a lush green setting. Swimming in natural pools, wild Barbary macaques and a permanent rainbow in the mist.
itineraires.route_3_poi_1_desc: Stop en route: a spectacular natural bridge carved in rock. Not touristy and free.
itineraires.route_3_poi_2_desc: 110 meters of freefall. Descend the stairs to the foot of the falls for a breathtaking panorama.
itineraires.route_3_poi_3_desc: For 20 MAD, sail at the foot of the waterfalls. Prepare to get splashed!
itineraires.route_3_poi_4_desc: Barbary macaques live freely around the waterfalls. They are used to visitors but watch your belongings.
itineraires.route_3_tip: Bring a swimsuit in summer. The natural pools at the base of the waterfalls are refreshing.
itineraires.cta_desc: Book your vehicle and hit the road to Morocco's wonders.
